method_summary: The paper introduces programmable lakehouse abstractions for modeling the data lifecycle, operationalizes a prototype for pipeline repair using a ReAct loop, and addresses safety objections for high-stakes automation.
key_innovation: The introduction of lakehouse abstractions that expose the entire data lifecycle through code, enabling safe automation of high-stakes workloads through an agentic loop.
limitations_stated: The prototype is presented as a feasibility demonstration rather than a full-fledged experimental benchmark
title: Safe, Untrusted, "Proof-Carrying" AI Agents: toward the agentic lakehouse
